response.justification: Bogdan Szabo brings over 20 years of broad software development experience and clear strength in developer tooling areas relevant to the role — CI/CD infrastructure, test framework authorship (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), and agentic/MCP tooling at re:cinq. However, this is a people-management role with explicit requirements around direct reports, performance management, and organizational change leadership, and the resume shows no evidence of managing direct reports at any point in his career. Staff-level individual contributor titles, teaching workshops, and founding an open-source project do not substitute for the 2+ years of formal people management the role requires. Without that foundation, the candidate does not meet the minimum bar for this position.
strengths: 20+ years of software development across embedded, mobile, web, and infrastructure — well above the 8-year minimum
Hands-on developer tooling experience: CI server setup, test runners, test assertion libraries, and AI-agent/MCP code generators
Some mobile background (iOS and Apple TV development at WatchUp) plus mentoring/teaching history (Selenium course, Refactoring Dojos)
concerns: No evidence of formal people management — no direct reports, no performance reviews, no hiring or firing responsibility mentioned anywhere in a 20+ year career
No demonstrated experience leading organizational change or owning a team-level technical roadmap in a managerial capacity
Primarily an individual contributor trajectory; Staff titles at re:cinq and Altom appear IC-track, not management-track

key_factors.factor: Relevant developer tooling and CI/CD exposure
